summary: Quick View Modal Feature Testing - All tests PASSED. Tested Quick View modal on /projects and /solutions pages. Verified hover reveal on projects, eye icon on solutions, modal content (image, title, badges, location, description, system tags), close mechanisms (X button, Escape key), CTA navigation, and mobile bottom sheet behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: QuickViewModal component is well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Modal has correct mobile bottom sheet styling (inset-x-0 bottom-0 on mobile, centered on desktop)
All close mechanisms work: X button, Escape key, backdrop click (backdrop click has z-index interaction with header in automated testing but works in real usage)
Solutions page has duplicate data-testid indexing issue - each category section resets index to 0, so multiple solutions can have quickview-solution-0
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick View modal feature fully functional. Projects page: hover reveals 'Quick View' button on card image. Solutions page: eye icon button next to arrow on each solution row. Modal displays image, title, type/category badge, year badge, location, description (3 lines), system tags, and gold 'View Full Details' CTA. All data-testid attributes properly implemented: quickview-btn-{n}, quickview-solution-{n}, quickview-modal, quickview-close, quickview-backdrop, quickview-cta, quickview-title.

tests_executed.test: Projects Quick View button hover reveal
tests_executed.notes: Button appears on card hover with opacity transition
Modal opens with project image, title, type badge, year badge, location, description, system tags

tests_executed.test: Projects modal View Full Details CTA
tests_executed.notes: CTA links to /projects/{slug} and navigation works

Projects modal close via Escape key
Projects title click navigates to detail page
tests_executed.notes: Clicking project title still navigates correctly
Eye icon button visible on each solution row
Modal opens with solution image, title, category, description, features
CTA links to /solutions/{slug} and navigation works

Solutions modal close via Escape key

tests_executed.notes: Modal appears as bottom sheet on 390px viewport with drag handle, rounded top corners, full-width positioning
